arts.ttl: Poland captain Piotr Zielinski defends posing for a post-match picture with Cristiano Ronaldo - after being slammed for having 'no honour' following 5-1 hammering by Portugal
arts.sum: The forward and team-mate Nicola Zalewski got snaps with Ronaldo in Porto on Friday night, despite the result threatening Poland with Nations League relegation.

arts.ttl: Scotland XI vs Poland – Predicted lineup and team news
arts.sum: Scotland take on Poland in a must-win UEFA Nations League game on Monday night. Steve Clarke’s side travel to Warsaw knowing only a win will be enough to preserve their top-tier status in the Nations League. However, a 1-0 win over Croatia last week has handed the Tartan Army an outside chance of qualification for […] The post Scotland XI vs Poland – Predicted lineup and team news first appeared on The Football Faithful.

arts.ttl: Poland vs Scotland – Match preview and team news
arts.sum: It’s all to play for as Scotland travel to Poland on Monday night in their final fixture of the Nations League’s group campaign. Steve Clarke’s side are bottom of the group but a 1-0 win over 10-man Croatia has given Scotland an outside chance of reaching the quarter-finals. Andrew Petrie, Barry Douglas and Jordan Campbell preview Poland v Scotland

arts.ttl: Poland captain refuses to apologise for taking photo with Cristiano Ronaldo after 5-1 defeat
arts.sum: Poland players Piotr Zielinski and Nicola Zalewski have been heavily criticised after taking photographs with Cristiano Ronaldo in the wake of their thrashing by Portugal

arts.ttl: Steve Clarke stood on Scotland brink but Hampden Houdini act has me excited again – Keith Jackson
arts.sum: Jacko is back on the Scotland bandwagon after the wheels came well and truly off for far too long

arts.ttl: Ben Doak may be Celtic lost Bhoy but former teammate convinced Scotland kid is going places
arts.sum: Doak couldn't resist the lure of Liverpool when he was at Parkhead but at least Scotland can bank on him being around

arts.ttl: Win or bust for Steve Clarke’s side – Scotland versus Poland talking points
arts.sum: The result will decide Scotland’s fate in this Nations League and determine both their place in the next one and the World Cup qualifying draw seeds.

arts.ttl: Scotland boss Clarke refuses to confirm if star man Doak will start must-win clash with Poland
arts.sum: Steve Clarke has warned that he won't gamble on playing Ben Doak against Poland if he feels that two games in four days would place too much strain on the teenage winger.
